subject: Re: Design review feedback
body:
Hi Priya,

Reviewed the mockups — love the direction on the onboarding flow. Two things:

1. The CTA on screen 3 feels buried. Can we make it more prominent?
2. Font size on mobile looks tight. Worth testing on a real device.

Otherwise good to go. Ship it.

Best, Rahul

subject: Re: Q3 planning timeline
body:
Amit,

Timeline works for me. One ask — can we push the stakeholder review from Thursday to Friday? I've got a conflict that afternoon and don't want to send a delegate for this one.

Everything else looks solid. Let's lock it in.

Thanks, R

subject: Re: Vendor proposal - DataSync
body:
Hi team,

Looked at the DataSync proposal. My take:

1. Pricing is fair for what we get — comparable to what we paid for ToolX last year
2. Integration timeline (3 weeks) is aggressive but doable if we start before July
3. One concern — their SLA doesn't cover weekend incidents. Worth pushing on that.

Recommendation: proceed, but negotiate the SLA clause before signing.

Best, Rahul
